title: ReflexionRecord
description: Structured error-learning record for Hyphae reflexion storage

id.description: Unique identifier for the reflexion record

root_cause.description: Root cause analysis of the error

abstract_pattern.description: Generalized pattern for avoiding similar errors in the future

project.description: Project where the error occurred, or null for cross-project patterns

confidence.description: Confidence level in the pattern's generalizability

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the record was created
